stemHtml: Annex V to EU Regulation No 965/2012 (Regulation on Air Operations), Part-SPA, details...

options.a: the operator's application, privileges, changes, and continued validity of special approvals.
options.b: the powers and responsibilities allocated to Competent Authorities for the oversight of air transport operators.
options.c: the administration and management system regarding civil air operations.
options.d: any specialised operation where the aircraft is used for specialised activities.
